Acid Arrow.name: 산성 화살 - Acid Arrow
Acid Arrow.description:
빛나는 녹색 화살이 나타나 사거리 내의, 시전자가 지정한 목표로 날아갑니다. 명중하면 강한 산이 터집니다. 목표에게 원거리 주문 공격을 합니다. 명중 시, 목표는 즉시 4d4점의 산성 피해를 받으며, 목표의 다음 턴이 끝날 때 추가로 2d4점의 산성 피해를 받습니다. 빗나갈 시, 피해는 절반으로 줄어들며 다음 턴이 끝날 때는 아무런 피해도 받지 않습니다.

상위시전. 3레벨 이상의 주문 슬롯을 사용하여 이 주문을 시전한 경우, 2레벨을 기준으로 슬롯 레벨이 1 증가할 때마다 (피해와 추가 피해 모두) 1d4점씩 증가합니다.

Arcane Ward v4.description:
Starting at 2nd level, you can weave magic around yourself for protection. When you cast an abjuration spell of 1st level or higher, you can simultaneously use a strand of the spell's magic to create a magical ward on yourself that lasts until you finish a long rest. The ward has hit points equal to twice your wizard level + your Intelligence modifier. Whenever you take damage, the ward takes the damage instead. If this damage reduces the ward to 0 hit points, you take any remaining 피해.

While the ward has 0 hit points, it can't absorb damage, but its magic remains. Whenever you cast an abjuration spell of 1st level or higher, the ward regains a number of hit points equal to twice the level of the spell.

Once you create the ward, you can't create it again until you finish a long rest.

Aura of Devotion - USE CPR.name: 오라 의 - Devotion - USE CPR
Aura of Devotion - USE CPR.description:
Starting at 7th level, you and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can’t be Charmed while you are conscious.

At 18th level, the range of this aura increases to 30 feet.

Midi-qol: requires Active Auras to function

Aura of Protection v4.name: 오라 의 - Protection v4
Aura of Protection v4.description:
Starting at 6th level, whenever you or a friendly creature within 10 feet of you must make a saving throw, the creature gains a bonus to the saving throw equal to your Charisma modifier (with a minimum bonus of +1). You must be conscious to grant this bonus.

At 18th level, the range of this aura increases to 30 feet.

Midi-qol: requires Active Auras to function. Aura will appear on token when applied

Aura of Vitality v4.name: 오라 의 - Vitality v4
Aura of Vitality v4.description:
Healing energy radiates from you in an aura with a 30-foot radius. Until the spell ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you. You can use a bonus action to cause 크리처 하나 in the aura (including you) to regain 2d6 hit points.

midi-qol: When you cast the spell choose "Enable Aura" which will consume the spell slot and enable the second activity "Heal Target" until the duration passes.

Banishment.name: 추방 - Banishment
Banishment.description:
당신은 사거리 내에서 볼 수 있는 크리처 하나를 이계로 추방하려 시도합니다. 목표는 매력 내성 굴림에 실패하게 되면 바로 추방될 것입니다.

만약 목표가 당신이 현재 위치한 세계 출신이라면, 이 주문은 목표를 무해한 데미플레인 어딘가로 날려 보냅니다. 목표는 주문의 지속시간 동안 행돌불능 상태로 그곳에 있게 되며, 주문이 종료되면 자신이 이전에 있었던 장소나 그에 가장 가까운 점유되지 않은 위치로 돌아옵니다.

만약 목표가 당신이 현재 위치한 세계가 아닌 이계 출신이라면, 목표는 펑 하는 소리와 함께 자신의 본래 세계로 추방될 것입니다. 만약 이 주문이 1분이 지나기 전에 종료되어 버렸다면, 목표는 주문이 종료됨과 동시에 자신이 있었던 장소나 그에 가장 가까운 점유되지 않은 위치로 돌아옵니다. 이 주문이 1분간 유지되었다면, 목표는 돌아올 수 없습니다.

상위시전. 당신이 5레벨 이상의 주문 슬롯을 사용하여 이 주문을 시전한 경우, 상승한 주문 슬롯 1레벨당 추가로 하나씩의 목표를 더 추방할 수 있습니다.

Bardic Inspiration (Valour) v4.description:
You can inspire others through stirring words or music. To do so, you use a bonus action on your turn to choose 크리처 하나 other than yourself within 60 feet of you who can hear you. That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die, a d6. Once within the next 10 minutes, the creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw it makes. The creature can wait until after it rolls the d20 before deciding to use the Bardic Inspiration die, but must decide before the GM says whether the roll succeeds or fails. Once the Bardic Inspiration die is rolled, it is lost. A creature can have only one Bardic Inspiration die at a time.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (a minimum of once).

You regain any expended uses when you finish a long rest.

Your Bardic Inspiration die changes when you reach certain levels in this class. The die becomes a d8 at 5th level, a d10 at 10th level, and a d12 at 15th level.

Bardic Inspiration v4.description:
You can inspire others through stirring words or music. To do so, you use a bonus action on your turn to choose 크리처 하나 other than yourself within 60 feet of you who can hear you. That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die, a d6. Once within the next 10 minutes, the creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw it makes. The creature can wait until after it rolls the d20 before deciding to use the Bardic Inspiration die, but must decide before the GM says whether the roll succeeds or fails. Once the Bardic Inspiration die is rolled, it is lost. A creature can have only one Bardic Inspiration die at a time.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (a minimum of once).

You regain any expended uses when you finish a long rest.

Your Bardic Inspiration die changes when you reach certain levels in this class. The die becomes a d8 at 5th level, a d10 at 10th level, and a d12 at 15th level.

Blessed Healer v4.description:
Beginning at 6th level, the healing spells you cast on others heal you as well.

When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that restores hit points to a creature other than you, you regain hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

**Foundry note: The healing formula is set to 2. Please add the additional from the spell level manually.

Midi-qol: Add the feature to a character and healing spells will reestore 2 + spell level points to the caster.

Broach of Shielding v4.name: Broach 의 - Shielding v4
Broach of Shielding v4.description:
Wondrous item, (requires attunement)

While wearing this brooch, you have resistance to force damage, and you have immunity to damage from the @Compendium[dnd5e.spells.41JIhpDyM9Anm7cs]{Magic Missile} spell.

midi-qol: implements damage resistance to force and if the actor is targeted by a spell called "Magic Missile" it will do no 피해.
12.4.15

Chill Touch v4.name: Chill 손길 - v4
Chill Touch v4.description:
You create a ghostly, skeletal hand in the space of a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the creature to assail it with the chill of the grave. 명중 시, 대상은 1d8 Necrotic damage, and it can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn를 받습니다. Until then, the hand clings to the target.

If you hit an undead target, it also has disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn.

This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

Midi-qol: 11.0.7: two effects are created since they expire at different times

Devil's Glaive v4.description: 근접 무기 공격: +5 명중, 사거리 10피트, 목표 하나. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing 피해. If the target is a creature other than an undead or a construct, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or lose 5 (1d10) hit points at the start of each of its turns due to an infernal wound. Each time the devil hits the wounded target with this attack, the damage dealt by the wound increases by 5 (1d10). Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

Divine Smite v4.description:
Starting at 2nd Level, when you hit a creature with a melee weapon Attack, you can expend one spell slot to deal radiant damage to the target, in addition to the weapon’s 피해.

The extra damage is 2d8 for a 1st-level spell slot, plus 1d8 for each Spell Level higher than 1st, to a maximum of 5d8.

The damage increases by 1d8 if the target is an Undead or a fiend, to a maximum of 6d8.

midi-qol:

This item uses the "item macro" feature where the macro that does the rolling is bound to the item to add the extra damage for undead targets

Update: according to sources (Jeremy Crawford) improved divine smite does not increase the damage done by a divine smite - despite the helper text in improved divine smite.

Emboldening Bond v4.name: Emboldening 결속 - v4
Emboldening Bond v4.description:
Emboldeing Bond is not SRD so you will need to populate the text.


Implemented:
Rolling the feature gives targeted tokens an effect that grants a one use bonus at the start of their turn to add 1d4 to any attack/save.check and is then removed until the start of their next turn.

dnd5e v4
Not implemented:
needing another bondee within 30 feet.

Giant Spider Bite.description:
근접 무기 공격:+5 명중,, 5 ft., 크리처 하나. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.

The target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, 실패 시 9 (2d8) poison damage를 받고, 성공 시 그 절반의 피해만 받습니다. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

The Giant Spider attacks with its Bite. The target must make a Constitution saving throw.

This is for the legacy (2014) rules

Goggles of Night (Item Macro Light Ampli.name: Goggles 의 밤 (Item Macro Light Amplification) 10.0.37

Greater Invisibility v4.description:
A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Anything the target is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the target's person. The spell ends for a target that attacks or casts a spell.

At Higher Levels. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.

* This version of Greater Invisibility uses the core Invisible status effect and interacts with foundry vision modes

Hold Person v4.description:
Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. 대상은 지혜 내성 굴림에 성공해야 하며, 실패하면 be paralyzed for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make another Wisdom saving throw. On a success, the spell ends on the target.

Higher Levels. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, you can target one additional humanoid for each slot level above 2nd. The humanoids must be within 30 feet of each other when you target them.

Assumes Convenient Effects

Hunter's Mark.name: 사냥꾼의 표식 - Hunter's Mark
Hunter's Mark.description:
사거리 내의, 볼 수 있는 크리처 하나에 신비한 표식을 찍어 사냥감으로 정합니다. 주문의 지속시간 동안, 당신이 사냥감에게 가하는 모든 무기 공격은 추가로 1d6점의 피해를 주며, 사냥감을 찾는 지혜(감지)나 지혜(생존) 판정에 유리함을 받을 수 있습니다. 주문의 지속시간이 끝나기 전에 사냥감의 hp가 0 이하로 떨어진 경우, 이후 턴에 추가 행동을 사용하여 새로운 크리처를 사냥감으로 지정할 수 있습니다.

상위시전. 3레벨이나 4레벨 주문 슬롯을 사용하여 이 주문을 시전한 경우, 집중 시 주문의 지속시간을 최대 8시간까지 늘릴 수 있습니다. 5레벨 이상의 주문 슬롯을 사용하여 이 주문을 시전한 경우, 집중 시 주문의 지속시간을 최대 24시간까지 늘릴 수 있습니다.

Ice Knife.description:
You create a shard of ice and fling it at 크리처 하나 within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. 명중 시, 대상은 1d10 Piercing damage를 받습니다. Hit or miss, the shard then explodes. The target and each creature within 5 feet of it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 Cold 피해.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The Cold damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 1.

Midi Verison 12.4.16

Improved Divine Smite.name: 향상된 신성한 강타 - Improved Divine Smite
Improved Divine Smite.description: 11레벨에 도달하면, 정의의 힘이 충만해지며 팔라딘이 가하는 모든 근접 무기 공격에 신성한 힘이 깃들게 됩니다. 팔라딘이 근접 무기로 다른 크리처를 공격해 명중시킬 때마다, 해당 크리처는 추가로 1d8점의 광휘 피해를 받습니다. 만약 공격하면서 @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.classfeatures.Item.ySMPQ6zNSlvkrl2f]{신성한 강타}를 사용했다면, 신성한 강타의 추가 피해에 이 피해가 더해집니다.

Indomitable.name: 불요불굴 - Indomitable
Indomitable.description:
당신은 실패한 내성 굴림을 다시 한 번 굴릴 수 있습니다. 이 효과로 재굴림 시 무조건 새로 나온 결과를 사용해야 하며, 한번 사용하면 긴 휴식을 마친 후 다시 사용할 수 있습니다.

13레벨부터 휴식 사이에 이 특성을 2번 사용할 수 있게 되며, 17레벨에 도달하면 3번 사용할 수 있게 됩니다.

Lay on Hands - USE CPR INSTEAD.description:
당신의 축복받은 손길은 상처를 치유합니다. 당신은 긴 휴식을 취하면 다시 차오르는 치유력 풀을 지닙니다. 이 풀로 당신은 팔라딘 레벨 × 5와 같은 총합의 HP를 회복시킬 수 있습니다.

행동으로 크리처 하나에 접촉해 치유력 풀에서 힘을 끌어와, 그 풀에 남아 있는 최대치까지 원하는 만큼의 HP를 회복시킬 수 있습니다.

또는 치유력 풀에서 HP 5점을 소모해 목표 하나의 질병 한 가지를 치료하거나 목표에게 영향을 주는 독 한 가지를 중화할 수 있습니다. 치유의 손길 한 번으로 여러 질병을 치료하고 여러 독을 중화할 수 있지만, 각각에 대해 HP를 따로 소모해야 합니다.

이 특성은 언데드와 구조물에게는 아무 효과가 없습니다.

Legendary Resistance.name: 전설적 저항 - Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: [[lookup @details.type.config.label lowercase]]의 내성 굴림이 실패한 경우, 대신 성공했다고 간주할 수 있습니다.

Longsword of Sharpness v12.4.15.name: Longsword 의 Sharpness v12.4.15
Longsword of Sharpness v12.4.15.description:
(Requires attunement)

When you attack an object with this magic sword and hit, maximize your weapon damage dice against the target.

When you attack a creature with this weapon and roll a 20 on the attack roll, that target takes an extra 4d6 slashing 피해. Then roll another d20. If you roll a 20, you lop off one of the target's limbs, with the effect of such loss determined by the GM. If the creature has no limb to sever, you lop off a portion of its body instead.

In addition, you can speak the sword's command word to cause the blade to shed bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. Speaking the command word again or sheathing the sword puts out the light.

MidiQOL: handles the 피해. ATL handles the light effects.

Mace of Disruption v4.name: Mace 의 - Disruption v4
Mace of Disruption v4.description:
(Requires attunement)

When you hit a fiend or an undead with this magic weapon, that creature takes an extra 2d6 radiant 피해. If the target has 25 hit points or fewer after taking this damage, it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be destroyed. 내성 굴림에 성공하면, the creature becomes frightened of you until the end of your next turn.

While you hold this weapon, it sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

Mace of Disruption v4 - no macro.name: Mace 의 - Disruption v4 - no macro
Mace of Disruption v4 - no macro.description:
(Requires attunement)

When you hit a fiend or an undead with this magic weapon, that creature takes an extra 2d6 radiant 피해. If the target has 25 hit points or fewer after taking this damage, it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be destroyed. 내성 굴림에 성공하면, the creature becomes frightened of you until the end of your next turn.

While you hold this weapon, it sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

Power Word Stun v4.description:
You speak a word of power that can overwhelm the mind of 크리처 하나 you can see within range, leaving it dumbfounded. If the target has 150 hit points or fewer, it is @Compendium[dnd5e.rules.w7eitkpD7QQTB6j0]{stunned}. Otherwise, the spell has no effect.

The @Compendium[dnd5e.rules.w7eitkpD7QQTB6j0]{stunned} target must make a Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. 내성 굴림에 성공하면, this stunning effect ends.

Midi-qol: requires DAE and Convenient Effects.

Rage v4.description:
In battle, you fight with primal ferocity. On your turn, you can enter a rage as a bonus action. While raging, you gain the following benefits if you aren't wearing heavy armor:

  • You have advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws.

  • When you make a melee weapon attack using Strength, you gain a bonus to the damage roll that increases as you gain levels as a barbarian, as shown in the Rage Damage column of the Barbarian table.

  • You have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing 피해.

If you are able to cast spells, you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

Your rage lasts for 1 minute. It ends early if you are knocked unconscious or if your turn ends and you haven't attacked a hostile creature since your last turn or taken damage since then. You can also end your rage on your turn as a bonus action.

Once you have raged the number of times shown for your barbarian level in the Rages column of the Barbarian table, you must finish a long rest before you can rage again.

Rakish Audacity.description:
Beginning at 1st level, you know how to strike subtly and exploit a foe's distraction. Once per turn, you can deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] damage to 크리처 하나 you hit with an attack if you have advantage on the attack roll. The attack must use a finesse or a ranged weapon.

You don't need advantage on the attack roll if another enemy of the target is within 5 feet of it, that enemy isn't incapacitated, and you don't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

The amount of the extra damage increases as you gain levels in this class, as shown in the Sneak Attack column of the Rogue table.

Regeneration.name: 재생 - Regeneration
Regeneration.description:
적어도 1HP가 남아 있다면, [[lookup @name lowercase]] 의 턴이 시작될 때 대상은 10HP를 회복합니다.

[[lookup @name lowercase]] 의 턴이 시작될 때 대상은 10HP를 회복합니다.

Sneak Attack 12.4.15.name: Sneak 공격 12.4.15
Sneak Attack 12.4.15.description:
Beginning at 1st level, you know how to strike subtly and exploit a foe's distraction. Once per turn, you can deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] damage to 크리처 하나 you hit with an attack if you have advantage on the attack roll. The attack must use a finesse or a ranged weapon.

You don't need advantage on the attack roll if another enemy of the target is within 5 feet of it, that enemy isn't incapacitated, and you don't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

The amount of the extra damage increases as you gain levels in this class, as shown in the Sneak Attack column of the Rogue table.

Sneak Attack v4.name: Sneak 공격 - v4
Sneak Attack v4.description:
Beginning at 1st level, you know how to strike subtly and exploit a foe's distraction. Once per turn, you can deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] damage to 크리처 하나 you hit with an attack if you have advantage on the attack roll. The attack must use a finesse or a ranged weapon.

You don't need advantage on the attack roll if another enemy of the target is within 5 feet of it, that enemy isn't incapacitated, and you don't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

The amount of the extra damage increases as you gain levels in this class, as shown in the Sneak Attack column of the Rogue table.

Spirit Guardians v4.name: 영혼 - Guardians v4
Spirit Guardians v4.description:
You call forth spirits to protect you. They flit around you to a distance of 15 feet for the duration. If you are good or neutral, their spectral form appears angelic or fey (your choice). If you are evil, they appear fiendish.

When you cast this spell, you can designate any number of creatures you can see to be unaffected by it. An affected creature's speed is halved in the area, and when the creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Wisdom saving throw. 내성 굴림에 실패하면, the creature takes 3d8 radiant damage (if you are good or neutral) or 3d8 necrotic damage (if you are evil). 내성 굴림에 성공하면, the creature takes half as much 피해.

At Higher Levels. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

Midi-qol: Requires active auras to work and assumes there is a combat active.
Supports the following:

  1. If a player enters the spirit guardian range on their turn they will save && take 피해.
  2. At the start of an affected tokens turn they will save && take 피해.
  3. If they move out of range of the effect they won't take damage anymore.
  4. All effects removed on expiry/loss of concentration.
  5. Spell scaling is supported automatically.
  6. If automated animations, only the initial cast will spawn the animation.

Warding Bond v4.name: Warding 결속 - v4
Warding Bond v4.description:
This spell wards a willing creature you touch and creates a mystic connection between you and the target until the spell ends. While the target is within 60 feet of you, it gains a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws, and it has resistance to all 피해. Also, each time it takes damage, you take the same amount of 피해.

The spell ends if you drop to 0 hit points or if you and the target become separated by more than 60 feet. It also ends if the spell is cast again on either of the connected creatures. You can also dismiss the spell as an action.
